overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The scene features towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, an elevated monorail track, distinctive pink cherry blossom trees, and moderate traffic with various cyberpunk-styled vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street under elevated monorail with industrial and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: following a beige sedan in the left lane under the elevated monorail track

notable_agents.action: beige sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: green metal elevated train track running overhead through the entire street
large industrial structure with massive ventilation fans and yellow pipes
tall modern building with glass facade and large digital billboards
tan-colored sedan driving ahead in the same lane
circular industrial fans mounted on the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight along a multi-lane street beneath an elevated monorail track. An industrial building with large ventilation fans dominates the left side while a modern glass building with digital billboards rises on the right. The camera follows a beige sedan traveling in the same direction through this canyon-like urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with mixed commercial buildings

events.description: vehicle changes to right lane and overtakes the beige sedan
approaching intersection with crosswalk and traffic from left

agents.ego_description: accelerating and overtaking the beige sedan on the right side

notable_agents.action: green car passing in the opposite direction on the left side of the road

entered.detail: distinctive pink-blossomed trees lining the left sidewalk
very tall glass and steel tower visible at the end of the street
white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle overtakes the beige sedan and continues toward a major intersection. Pink cherry blossom trees become visible on the left, contrasting with the industrial architecture. The street opens up slightly as the vehicle approaches the crosswalk, with a towering skyscraper visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with stairs and commercial storefronts

events.description: turns left off main road into pedestrian plaza area with stairs

agents.ego_description: making a left turn into a plaza area, navigating around pedestrians and stairs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking on the sidewalk near the stairs

entered.detail: large outdoor staircase with orange steps and green metal framework
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel stripes
tall palm trees lining the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The vehicle makes a left turn into a pedestrian plaza featuring a prominent orange staircase structure. The scene shifts from the enclosed street to a more open plaza with pedestrians walking on the sidewalks. The vehicle crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk before exiting back onto the main thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial avenue with large digital billboards and palm trees

events.description: passing large samurai-themed digital billboard on right

agents.ego_description: cruising along the wide avenue passing other vehicles and observing the commercial district

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying samurai imagery and text
modern commercial structure with glass windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along a wide commercial avenue lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, including a prominent samurai-themed display on the right. The architecture features modern glass and steel commercial buildings, and the elevated monorail track remains visible overhead as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey through a dense urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit commercial avenue. It begins by driving beneath an elevated monorail track, navigating a canyon-like street between an industrial building with ventilation fans and a glass tower adorned with digital billboards. As the vehicle overtakes a beige sedan, the industrial architecture gives way to the soft pink of cherry blossom trees before the road expands toward a major intersection. The camera then follows a left turn into a pedestrian plaza, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk and passing a prominent orange staircase structure. Finally, the scene shifts back onto a broad thoroughfare lined with palm trees and massive samurai-themed digital displays, continuing under the monorail track amidst moderate city traffic.
